title: nageia koraiana
intro: Nageia koraiana, also known as Korarima, is a type of plant species belonging to the family Podocarpaceae, native to Madagascar. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and alkaloids. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Nageia koraiana include infusions, decoctions, and essential oil extraction, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
